top3.sql:
SELECT dname
FROM satscores
WHERE rtype = 'D' AND NumTstTakr > 0
GROUP BY dname
ORDER BY AVG(AvgScrRead) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT dname
FROM satscores
WHERE satscores.cds IN (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM schools
    WHERE StatusType = 'Active'
)
GROUP BY dname
ORDER BY AVG(AvgScrRead) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT dname
FROM satscores
WHERE rtype = 'D' AND NumTstTakr > 0
GROUP BY dname
ORDER BY AVG(AvgScrRead) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT dname
FROM satscores
WHERE satscores.cds IN (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM schools
    WHERE StatusType = 'Active'
)
GROUP BY dname
ORDER BY AVG(AvgScrRead) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT dname
FROM satscores
INNER JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode
WHERE schools.StatusType = 'Active'
GROUP BY dname
ORDER BY AVG(AvgScrRead) DESC
LIMIT 1;

    WHERE StatusType = 'Active'
